All 4 p2p tests pass on base commit. 3 fail_to_pass tests correctly fail (awaiting fix).

validate.notes: Fixed Dockerfile base commit from 2af6822c2108eabc0228d7809aa27c00bb2ebb53 to 24d8716e366909129ffd66670e1e530e6796097d (parent of PR #35523).
